sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using PineApple ('the App'), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not use the App.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.content: You must be at least 13 years old to use PineApple. By using the App, you represent and warrant that you meet this requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement.

sections.title: User Accounts
sections.content: To access certain features, you must create an account and provide accurate information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You may update your profile information and change your password at any time through the App settings.

sections.title: User Features and Controls
sections.content: PineApple allows users to follow and unfollow other users, block users, hide posts, save posts, and manage their account settings. Blocking a user restricts certain interactions but does not guarantee complete invisibility across the platform. Users are responsible for managing their own privacy settings.

sections.title: User-Generated Content
sections.content: The App allows users to post photos, comments, and messages. You retain ownership of the content you create. By posting content, you grant PineApple a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, reproduce, and distribute such content within the App for operating and improving the service.

sections.title: Community Guidelines and Prohibited Conduct
sections.content: You agree not to post or share content that is unlawful, harmful, abusive, threatening, defamatory, obscene, infringing, misleading, or otherwise objectionable. You may not harass other users, impersonate individuals, send spam, upload malicious code, or interfere with the App’s functionality.

sections.title: Messaging and User Interactions
sections.content: Users may communicate through private messages. You are solely responsible for your communications and interactions with other users. PineApple does not control or guarantee the behavior of users and is not responsible for disputes between users.

sections.title: Content Moderation and Reporting
sections.content: Users may report content or accounts that violate these Terms. We reserve the right to review, remove, restrict, or disable content or accounts at our sole discretion if we believe they violate these Terms or applicable laws.

sections.title: Event Bookings
sections.content: PineApple enables users to book events listed within the App. PineApple does not process payments and does not guarantee the quality, safety, legality, or fulfillment of events. Any agreements or disputes regarding events are solely between the users involved.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All trademarks, logos, designs, software, and platform content (excluding user-generated content) are owned by PineApple or its licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse engineer any part of the App.

sections.title: Account Suspension and Termination
sections.content: We may suspend, restrict, or terminate your account if you violate these Terms, harm other users, or misuse the App. You may delete your account at any time through the App settings.

sections.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: The App is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access, error-free operation, or the accuracy of content posted by users.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, PineApple shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the App, including user interactions, content, blocked users, or event bookings.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these Terms & Conditions from time to time. Continued use of the App after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the country in which PineApple operates.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.content: If you have questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at support@pineappleapp.com.
